en.extract:
The red-breasted coua (Coua serriana) is a species of cuckoo in the family Cuculidae.
It is endemic to Madagascar.

The '''red-breasted coua''' ('''''Coua serriana''''') is a species of [[cuckoo]] in the family [[Cuculidae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Madagascar]].
